description: Create a GitHub Actions CD workflow that triggers on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux-win on ubuntu-latest, build-linux-release on ubuntu-16.04, and macosx-bintray on macos-latest. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures, builds, and packages the Texstudio project. The jobs then upload artifacts and release them on GitHub or Bintray.
